## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature or module
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — restructure without feature change
- [ ] `test` — adding or fixing tests
- [ ] `chore` — build config, CI, dependencies
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement

## Module affected

- [ ] Module 1 — Connector Framework
- [ ] Module 2 — Database Abstraction Layer
- [ ] Module 3 — ETL Engine
- [ ] Module 4 — CDC / Real-Time Layer
- [ ] Module 5 — Metadata-Driven Data Warehouse
- [ ] Module 6 — BI Dashboard
- [ ] Module 7 — Data Quality Engine
- [ ] Module 8 — Data Lineage
- [ ] Module 9 — Data Catalog
- [ ] Module 10 — Security & Compliance
- [ ] Infrastructure / Docker
- [ ] Documentation

## Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with `develop` (`git rebase develop`)
- [ ] Code runs locally without errors
- [ ] `docker compose up -d` still works
- [ ] Tests written or updated where relevant
- [ ] Documentation updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] No `.env` file or credentials committed
- [ ] Commit messages follow the `type(scope): message` convention
